files.raw_diff:
diff --git a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
@@ -23,10 +23,14 @@
 
 @router.post("/run", status_code=202)
 async def start_run(
     body: PipelineRunRequest,
     background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
 ) -> dict:
     """
     Start a new pipeline run in the background.
     """
+    # Input Validation Guard
+    if not body.diff_text or len(body.diff_text.strip()) < 10:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="diff_text must be at least 10 characters long.")
+        
     orchestrator = PipelineOrchestrator()
     # A temporary orchestration is needed to get the run_id before starting

scenarios.title: Valid Pipeline Run Request
scenarios.description: Send a POST request to /api/pipeline/run with a valid PipelineRunRequest body, as defined in the changed pipeline.py file.

steps.value: response JSON contains 'run_id' and 'status' keys with values
steps.assertion: response.run_id is a non-empty string, response.status is 'queued'

scenarios.expected_result: Response status 202 Accepted with JSON containing a unique run_id and status 'queued'.

scenarios.title: Invalid JSON in Request Body
scenarios.description: Send a POST request with malformed JSON to /api/pipeline/run to test validation added in pipeline.py changes.
scenarios.expected_result: FastAPI returns a validation error, typically 422 Unprocessable Entity, due to invalid JSON.

scenarios.title: Missing Required Field in PipelineRunRequest
scenarios.description: Assume PipelineRunRequest has required fields; send a request without a mandatory field like 'label' to /api/pipeline/run.
scenarios.expected_result: Validation error response indicating missing required field.

scenarios.title: Empty Request Body
scenarios.description: Send a POST request with an empty body to /api/pipeline/run to test edge case handling in the modified route.
scenarios.expected_result: Error response due to missing or invalid request body.

scenarios.title: Concurrent Pipeline Run Requests
scenarios.description: Start multiple pipeline runs simultaneously to /api/pipeline/run to test for race conditions or resource limits introduced by changes.

steps.value: Send 5 concurrent POST requests to /api/pipeline/run with valid JSON
Check that all returned run_id values are unique

scenarios.expected_result: All requests are accepted with unique run_ids and status 'queued'.

scenarios.title: SQL Injection Probe in Request Field
scenarios.description: Attempt SQL injection in request fields (e.g., label) sent to /api/pipeline/run to test for vulnerabilities in the changed code.

steps.assertion: status is 202 or 422, but no SQL errors

scenarios.expected_result: Request is handled without database errors; either accepted or validation fails safely.

scenarios.title: XSS Probe in Request Field
scenarios.description: Inject JavaScript payload in request fields to /api/pipeline/run to test for XSS if data is logged or displayed later.

steps.assertion: status is 202 or 422, no script execution in response

scenarios.expected_result: Request is processed without executing scripts; data is sanitized or handled safely.

scenarios.title: Incorrect HTTP Method for /run Endpoint
scenarios.description: Send a GET request instead of POST to /api/pipeline/run to test method handling in the updated pipeline.py.
scenarios.expected_result: Method Not Allowed error (405) since only POST is supported.

generated_specs.content:
import os
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

BASE_URL = os.environ.get("BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")
FORM_PAGE_URL = BASE_URL  # Assuming the pipeline run form is at the base URL

# SCENARIO_ID: d8e5c776-4a60-4829-8f5e-b438cdc9f447
def test_valid_pipeline_run_request_shows_success_with_run_id_and_queued_status(page: Page):
    page.goto(FORM_PAGE_URL)
    label_input = page.get_by_label("Label")
    parameters_input = page.get_by_label("Parameters")
    submit_button = page.get_by_role("button", name="Run Pipeline")
    
    label_input.fill("test-run")
    parameters_input.fill("{}")
    submit_button.click()
    
    success_message = page.get_by_role("alert")
    expect(success_message).to_contain_text("run_id")
    expect(success_message).to_contain_text("queued")

# SCENARIO_ID: 9293f9bd-95d7-4af6-a7fe-a67c7ee4b989
def test_invalid_json_in_request_body_shows_validation_error(page: Page):
    page.goto(FORM_PAGE_URL)
    parameters_input = page.get_by_label("Parameters")
    submit_button = page.get_by_role("button", name="Run Pipeline")
    
    parameters_input.fill("invalid json string")
    submit_button.click()
    
    error_message = page.get_by_role("alert")
    expect(error_message).to_contain_text("Invalid JSON")

# SCENARIO_ID: 78f64315-daca-459b-9451-d58b78c499df
def test_missing_required_field_label_shows_validation_error(page: Page):
    page.goto(FORM_PAGE_URL)
    parameters_input = page.get_by_label("Parameters")
    submit_button = page.get_by_role("button", name="Run Pipeline")
    
    parameters_input.fill("{}")
    submit_button.click()
    
    error_message = page.get_by_role("alert")
    expect(error_message).to_contain_text("label")
    expect(error_message).to_contain_text("required")

# SCENARIO_ID: d58a1f52-2496-40e6-a0b6-e1adfb489347
def test_empty_request_body_shows_validation_error(page: Page):
    page.goto(FORM_PAGE_URL)
    submit_button = page.get_by_role("button", name="Run Pipeline")
    
    submit_button.click()
    
    error_message = page.get_by_role("alert")
    expect(error_message).to_contain_text("required")

# SCENARIO_ID: e73b6211-435d-4bc9-a537-228698c0f810
def test_concurrent_pipeline_run_requests_yield_unique_run_ids(page: Page):
    page.goto(FORM_PAGE_URL)
    label_input = page.get_by_label("Label")
    parameters_input = page.get_by_label("Parameters")
    submit_button = page.get_by_role("button", name="Run Pipeline")
    
    run_ids = []
    for i in range(5):
        label_input.fill(f"test-run-{i}")
        parameters_input.fill("{}")
        submit_button.click()
        success_message = page.get_by_role("alert")
        expect(success_message).to_contain_text("run_id")
        # Extract run_id from message - assuming it's displayed in a span or similar
        run_id_element = page.get_by_text(/run_id: \S+/)
        run_id_text = run_id_element.text_content()
        run_id = run_id_text.split(": ")[1]
        run_ids.append(run_id)
        page.reload()  # Reset for next submission
    
    assert len(run_ids) == len(set(run_ids)), "Duplicate run_ids found"

# SCENARIO_ID: 115b89bd-e2e1-447c-911e-039db4a55d56
def test_sql_injection_probe_in_label_field_handled_safely(page: Page):
    page.goto(FORM_PAGE_URL)
    label_input = page.get_by_label("Label")
    parameters_input = page.get_by_label("Parameters")
    submit_button = page.get_by_role("button", name="Run Pipeline")
    
    label_input.fill("test' OR '1'='1")
    parameters_input.fill("{}")
    submit_button.click()
    
    # Expect either success or validation error, but no SQL error message
    response_element = page.get_by_role("alert")
    expect(response_element).not_to_contain_text("SQL")
    expect(response_element).not_to_contain_text("database")

# SCENARIO_ID: 10779550-4a70-4504-a928-6a59479cfda1
def test_xss_probe_in_label_field_handled_safely(page: Page):
    page.goto(FORM_PAGE_URL)
    label_input = page.get_by_label("Label")
    parameters_input = page.get_by_label("Parameters")
    submit_button = page.get_by_role("button", name="Run Pipeline")
    
    label_input.fill("<script>alert('xss')</script>")
    parameters_input.fill("{}")
    submit_button.click()
    
    # Check that the label is displayed as plain text, not executed
    displayed_label = page.get_by_text("<script>alert('xss')</script>")
    expect(displayed_label).to_be_visible()
    # Ensure no alert popup by checking page stability
    expect(page).not_to_have_url(containing="alert")

# SCENARIO_ID: 85583956-4c35-46cd-b8d5-32ed0c65217f
def test_get_request_to_pipeline_run_endpoint_shows_method_not_allowed_error(page: Page):
    url = f"{BASE_URL}/api/pipeline/run"
    page.goto(url)
    
    error_message = page.get_by_text("405")
    expect(error_message).to_be_visible()
    expect(page.get_by_text("Method Not Allowed")).to_be_visible()
